ranks.name: Lord Warden
ranks.desc: Tasked with guiding policy, the Lord or Lady Warden presides over the Warden's Council as first among equals.

ranks.name: Warden
ranks.desc: Wardens oversee the Argent Gryphon in all its affairs, bearing responsibility for its purpose.

ranks.name: Oathsworn
ranks.desc: Oathsworn are those entrusted with the Order's deepest lore, bound to carry both its purpose and its peril.

ranks.name: Enlightened
ranks.desc: Enlightened understands the significance of the Order's old oaths and the inherited wisdom upon which the Order stands.

ranks.name: Shieldbearer
ranks.desc: Shieldbearers have earned distinction through trial, worthy of bearing the Griffin Shield and are entrusted with official duties.

ranks.name: Initiate
ranks.desc: Initiates are sworn aspirants, committed to proving their worth in hopes of earning a place in the Order.

ranks.name: Sentinel
ranks.desc: Sentinels are men-at-arms and retinues who serve the Order as skilled agents, honour guards or captains, in exchange for obligation or pay.

ranks.name: Ward
ranks.desc: Wards are guests of the castle, bound by no oath beyond the pledge to keep the peace during their stay.
